entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Models employed for precise streamflow prediction that can suffer from overfitting and low accuracy on unseen data

entities.name: STREAMFLOW PREDICTION
entities.description: The objective of predicting the flow of water in streams, particularly in data-scarce basins

entities.name: OVERFITTING
entities.description: A limitation of ML models where they fail to generalize to unseen data

entities.name: SPATIOTEMPORAL VARIABILITY
entities.description: High variability and heterogeneity across space and time in streamflow data

entities.name: WAVELET ENSEMBLING
entities.description: A novel ensembling method used to develop a generalised streamflow model to overcome ML limitations

entities.name: TRANSFER LEARNING-BASED LEAVE-ONE-OUT CROSS-VALIDATION
entities.description: A validation technique used to test the generalisability of the employed models

entities.name: GENETIC ALGORITHM
entities.description: An optimization algorithm used to enhance the RF-based WE model

entities.name: WE-RF-GA
entities.description: A genetic algorithm optimised RF-based Wavelet Ensembling model found to be the most efficient

entities.name: TRIBUTARIES
entities.description: A specific terrain condition where standalone and ensemble models showed higher accuracy

entities.name: PLAIN TOPOGRAPHY
entities.description: A specific terrain condition where standalone and ensemble models showed higher accuracy

entities.name: LOW-FLOW CONDITIONS
entities.description: A specific flow condition where standalone and ensemble models showed higher accuracy

entities.name: MAINSTREAM FLOW
entities.description: A flow condition where WE models reduced the performance gap compared to standalone models

entities.name: HILLY TERRAIN
entities.description: A terrain condition where WE models reduced the performance gap compared to standalone models

entities.name: HIGH-FLOW VALUES
entities.description: A flow condition where WE models reduced the performance gap compared to standalone models

entities.name: DATA-SCARCE AND UNGAUGED BASINS
entities.description: Basins lacking sufficient data where effective streamflow prediction is required
